notableEvents.label: Pickoff

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Hunter Bigge on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward singles on a line drive to right fielder Victor Mesa Jr. Blaze Alexander scores. Taylor Ward to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Victor Mesa Jr.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz doubles (9) on a fly ball to center fielder Leody Taveras. Yandy Díaz to 3rd. Yandy Díaz advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Leody Taveras.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson GIDP
